claims.claim: Router initialization.** A top-1 routing network is initialized to assign each input token to exactly one expert.

evidence_refs.quote: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) upcycling—converting a dense model checkpoint into a sparse MoE model by copying feed-forward weights into multiple experts—has been proposed as a compute-efficient path to sparse models. We implement and evaluate the core retrofit mechanics in a controlled NumPy-only prototype: a 2-layer dense MLP trained on a heterogeneous piecewise regression task with four latent regimes is upcycled into a top-1 routed 4-expert MoE model.
